headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 20, 2026**
article:
The San Francisco Giants suffered a 0-3 loss to the Washington Nationals, with Curtis Mead leading the Giants' offense. Mead hit a home run and drove in two runs in the game. In other action, the Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

Several players have been impacted by injuries, including Edwin Díaz, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies. Other injured players include Miles Mastrobuoni (right calf strain), Brendan Donovan (left groin muscle strain), Jonathan India (left shoulder subluxation), Mason Englert (right forearm tightness), and Nick Allen (mid-back spasms).

The Houston Astros made a trade, acquiring SS Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for RHP Wilmy Sanchez. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring RHP Axel Perez from the Los Angeles Dodgers in exchange for RHP Chayce McDermott.

top_news.title: **Giants Fall Short in Washington**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants suffered a 0-3 loss to the Washington Nationals, with Curtis Mead leading the Giants' offense. Mead hit a home run and drove in two runs in the game.

top_news.title: **Pirates Take Down Rays 6-3**
top_news.summary: The Pittsburgh Pirates secured a 6-3 victory over the Tampa Bay Rays, with Mitch Keller pitching 7.0 innings and allowing 2 earned runs. Junior Caminero led the Pirates' offense with a home run and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Royals Fall to Yankees in Dominant 7-0 Shutout**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a convincing 7-0 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Ryan Weathers earning the win after 7.1 innings of scoreless relief. Trent Grisham led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 3rd home run of the season, a fly ball to right field that scored two runs.

top_news.title: **Orioles Fall to Guardians in 4-8 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles suffered a tough defeat at the hands of the Cleveland Guardians, who won 4-8. José Ramírez led the Guardians' offense with 2 home runs and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Rally Past Tigers 8-6**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox secured a 6-8 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with multiple players contributing to the win. Impact hitters for the Red Sox included Kevin McGonigle and Masataka Yoshida, while the Tigers' Riley Greene and Hao-Yu Lee also had notable performances.

top_news.title: **Díaz Lands on IL with Elbow Issue**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Dodgers right-handed pitcher Edwin Díaz has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to right elbow loose bodies.

top_news.title: **Astros Acquire Shewmake in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Houston Astros made a move on April 19, 2026, acquiring shortstop Braden Shewmake from the New York Yankees in exchange for right-handed pitcher Wilmy Sanchez.
